name: Attempt Heatmap
description: Shows where attempts usually end in a level.

toggle-heatmap.name: Toggle Heatmap
toggle-heatmap.description: Shows or hides the in-level death heatmap.

save-point.name: Save Heat Point
save-point.description: Adds your current position to the heatmap for this level.

clear-storage.name: Clear Current Heatmap
clear-storage.description: Clears saved heatmap points for the current level.
